title: lupinus lyallii var. fruticulosus
intro: Lupinus lyallii var. fruticulosus is a specific variety of the Lyall's lupin, a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Lupinus lyallii var. fruticulosus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
